rationale: The agent produced no answer (best-effort fallback failed).

fact_verdicts.fact: Microsoft reported ~228,000 full-time employees as of June 30, 2025
Nvidia reported ~42,000 employees in its FY2026 10-K (fiscal year ended January 2026)

failure.rationale: The agent fetched both the correct SEC 10-K pages for Microsoft and Nvidia, so the right sources were reached; but it ran out of time (115.9 seconds, time-limit hit) before it could parse the employee counts from those pages and compute the difference, producing no answer.
